scripts.build: npm run build:eks && npm run build:aks && npm run build:gke
scripts.build:aks: chant build src/aks --lexicon azure -o dist/aks-infra.json && chant build src/aks --lexicon k8s -o dist/aks-k8s.yaml
scripts.build:eks: chant build src/eks --lexicon aws -o dist/eks-infra.json && chant build src/eks --lexicon k8s -o dist/eks-k8s.yaml
scripts.build:gke: chant build src/gke --lexicon gcp -o dist/gke-infra.json && chant build src/gke --lexicon k8s -o dist/gke-k8s.yaml
scripts.lint: chant lint src/eks && chant lint src/aks && chant lint src/gke
